title: cornus alternifolia f. argentea
intro: Cornus alternifolia f. argentea, also known as Silver Pagoda Dogwood, is a cultivar of the Cornus alternifolia tree, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America. Its bark and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The Silver Pagoda Dogwood is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion, as well as supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Silver Pagoda Dogwood include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
